message:
refactor(fcp-store): extract ZonePlanInputs and derive Default for RepairSloMetrics

Extract a ZonePlanInputs struct from plan_zone() to bundle the
intermediate collection state (policy targets, coverage samples,
candidate actions, object counts). Split plan_zone() into
collect_zone_plan_inputs() for the data-gathering phase and the
existing budget/sort/partition phase. Replace the manual Default impl
for RepairSloMetrics with #[derive(Default)] since all fields zero-init.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
